title: Meta Slots
tagline: Scatters don't trigger — they fill a meter. 10 → bonus.
mechanic: Each scatter gives +1 PERSISTENT progress (carried across rounds). At 10 progress the next spin pays a bonus and resets the meter. Base line wins pay every spin. Because the bonus is a DEFERRED payout earned cheap and cashed later, it's exploitable by bet-switching and round-rollback — so it runs on a bet-aware adapter that locks your stake for the whole meter and rolls money+progress back together.
showcases: the bet-switch exploit and the stake-lock that kills it
the rollback-farming exploit and atomic (balance,carry) commit
why this defense CANNOT live in currency-blind math
mathTest: Two-part RTP (base line wins + amortised bonus). Attacked in tools/attack: bet-switch is rejected (StakeLockViolation), rollback reverts progress with the money — no minting.
